name: initiative-tracker
description: Combat initiative and turn order management with automatic sorting, HP tracking, condition management, round counting, and death save tracking. Maintains the full state of an active combat encounter so the DM can focus on running the fight instead of managing a spreadsheet.
author: Cocapn

commands.name: init:start
commands.description: Start a new combat encounter by rolling initiative for all participants
commands.example: init:start Thorin +3, Lyra +4, Brother Cedric +1, Whisper +5, 4x Goblin +2, 1x Goblin Boss +3

commands.name: init:next
commands.description: Advance to the next turn in initiative order

commands.name: init:current
commands.description: Show the current initiative order and whose turn it is

commands.name: init:hp
commands.description: Set or modify a creature's hit points

commands.name: init:condition
commands.description: Add or remove a condition on a creature

commands.name: init:add
commands.description: Add a new creature to the initiative order mid-combat

commands.name: init:remove
commands.description: Remove a creature from the initiative order

commands.name: init:end
commands.description: End the current combat encounter and log summary
